ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "fpts" INTEGER /* Fantasy points scored by the team in the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or away game indicator */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., guard, forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_num" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the performance */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "3fga" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted by the player */,
  "3fgm" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "3fg_pct" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus for the player */,
  "fouls_drawn" INTEGER /* Fouls drawn by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in coaching */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the coach (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "avg_pts" REAL /* Average points scored per game by the team */,
  "avg_pts_against" REAL /* Average points scored against the team per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury reported */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Projected return date from injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the fan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the ticket was sold */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan who purchased the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket sold */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being analyzed */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season of the analysis */,
  "avg_pts" REAL /* Average points scored by the player over the season */,
  "avg_reb" REAL /* Average rebounds by the player over the season */,
  "avg_ast" REAL /* Average assists by the player over the season */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player over the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES team_stats ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being predicted */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season of the prediction */,
  "predicted_avg_pts" REAL /* Predicted average points scored by the player over the season */,
  "predicted_avg_reb" REAL /* Predicted average rebounds by the player over the season */,
  "predicted_avg_ast" REAL /* Predicted average assists by the player over the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES team_stats ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "scouting_date" TEXT /* Date the scouting report was created */,
  "strengths" TEXT /* Strengths of the opponent team */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Weaknesses of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
